case_title: WESLEY WILLIS VS. DONTAY GAMAR SR. et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIS, WESLEY

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-23-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF WESLEY WILLIS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
